metadata.description: Phase 07 plan 07-01 scaffolding style. Frozen 8-layer order (background / landcover / water / boundaries / roads / pois / mirk_fog / user_location) derived from the Protomaps basemaps neutral light variant with glyphs + sprites bundled as local assets and the PMTiles source URL rewritten at runtime by PmtilesSource. Downstream plans (07-03 / 07-06) may tune paint properties but MUST NOT reorder the layers — the order is asserted in test/presentation/map_style_layer_order_test.dart.
metadata.mirkfall:mirk_fog_note: The 'mirk_fog' layer ships in Phase 07 as a no-op 'background' type with background-opacity=0 because MapLibre fill/fill-extrusion/line/symbol layers require a bound source, and creating a dummy empty-GeoJSON source for a layer that paints nothing is wasteful. Phase 09 (fog rendering) replaces this layer with a real type:'fill' layer wired to the MirkRenderer source at the same z-index position.
metadata.mirkfall:runtime_url_placeholder: pmtiles://file:///YOUR_PMTILES_PATH_PLACEHOLDER is rewritten at runtime by lib/infrastructure/map/pmtiles_source.dart (Phase 07 plan 07-03) to point at the current country PMTiles (or the world bundle for zoom<3 or uninstalled viewports).
